                                                                                                                    (1) Commercialization of CDB is different from the reform in com-
                                                                                                                    mercial banks. Since the commercialization of CDB, we need to
                                                                                                                    continue our financial business in mid- and long-term credit and
                                                                                                                    investment, serving for significant mid- and long-term strategy of
                                                                                                                    national economy. China’s urbanization has entered a new climax,
                                                                                                                    which needs CDB to provide more mid- and long-term capital for
                                                                                                                    urban construction. CDB’s policy tasks are harder and heavier.
